allow_write.description: Allow the mise MCP server to run state-changing commands (install, use, uninstall, upgrade, run task, config set, set env, trust, sync tasks). Read-only tools always work.

project_root.description: Optional absolute path mise should operate in when a tool call does not specify `cwd`. Defaults to the server process working directory.

binary_path.description: Optional absolute path to a locally built `mise-mcp` binary. When set, the extension uses it instead of downloading a release binary (useful for development).
